message:
Consolidate demo/runtime JSONL logging around shared event builder + sink abstraction (#32)

Expand test_logging.rs to be the authoritative JSONL logging owner:
- Single escape_json implementation (now handles all control chars via \uXXXX)
- JsonlSink enum (Stderr, File) for output destination abstraction
- JsonlValue enum for mixed string/numeric fields (log_mixed API)
- make_demo_logger factory and demo_logger convenience wrapper replace
  copy-pasted OnceLock + env-gate + run_id + seed + screen_mode bootstrap
- env_flag_enabled helper for env-var boolean gates

Migrate all ad-hoc emitters in app.rs to use the shared logger:
- perf_hud: PERF_HUD_LOG_SEQ + perf_hud_jsonl_enabled -> perf_hud_logger()
- a11y: A11Y_LOG_SEQ + a11y_jsonl_enabled -> a11y_logger()
- palette: PALETTE_LOG_SEQ + palette_log_path -> palette_logger() with File sink
- tour: TOUR_LOG_SEQ + tour_log_path -> tour_logger() with File sink

Remove duplicate escape_json from:
- app.rs (was at line ~2569)
- terminal_capabilities.rs DiagnosticEntry::escape_json

Consolidate logger bootstrapping in:
- screen_init_logger -> demo_logger(&LOGGER, "demo_screen_init", &[])
- mouse_jsonl_logger -> demo_logger(&LOGGER, "demo_mouse", &[])
- perf_challenge_logger (performance_hud.rs) -> demo_logger(...)

Add TODO(#32) to ftui-runtime queueing_scheduler::escape_json noting it
should be consolidated once the shared logger is available as a dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
